mod.name: Random Foreseer
page.title: Random Foreseer
page.description: Configure prediction features for random outcomes. Some settings may require Save & Load to take effect.
page.debug.title: Debug
page.debug.description: [red]Warning:[/red] these tools are intended only for development and verification, and may change game content. Keep them off during normal play.
section.general_prediction.title: General settings
section.general_prediction.description: Controls prediction availability across game modes.
section.out_of_combat_prediction.title: Out-of-combat prediction
section.out_of_combat_prediction.descrip: Controls random outcomes shown outside combat.
section.in_combat_prediction.title: In-combat prediction
section.in_combat_prediction.description: Controls random outcomes shown during combat.
section.ancient_event_debug.title: Ancient events
section.ancient_event_debug.description: Debug tools for Ancient event pages.
section.relic_pickup_debug.title: Relic pickup prediction
section.relic_pickup_debug.description: Debug tools for relic pickup prediction.
toggle.enable_singleplayer_prediction.de: When disabled, prediction results are hidden in singleplayer even if individual prediction settings are enabled.
toggle.enable_multiplayer_prediction.des: When disabled, prediction results are hidden in multiplayer even if individual prediction settings are enabled.
toggle.enable_fair_mode.label: Enable fair mode
toggle.enable_fair_mode.description: When enabled, predictions are limited to information that can be obtained through Save & Load.
toggle.enable_drift_warnings.label: Show prediction drift warnings
toggle.enable_drift_warnings.description: When enabled, predictions that may be shifted by side effects show a warning tooltip.
toggle.enable_transform_prediction.label: Predict transform results
toggle.enable_transform_prediction.descr: When enabled, deck transform confirmation previews show the exact card the current RNG will produce.
toggle.enable_potion_card_prediction.des: When enabled, random-card potion tooltips show the exact cards the current RNG will produce.
toggle.enable_potion_generation_predicti: When enabled, Entropic Brew and Alchemize tooltips show the exact potions the current RNG will produce.
toggle.enable_combat_card_prediction.des: When enabled, combat card tooltips show the exact random cards the current RNG will generate.
toggle.enable_combat_card_selection_pred: When enabled, combat card tooltips and hand highlights show the exact existing cards the current RNG will select.
toggle.enable_orb_prediction.label: Predict orb effects
toggle.enable_orb_prediction.description: When enabled, supported orb-triggering card tooltips show the targets that orb effects will hit.
toggle.enable_auto_play_from_draw_pile_p: When enabled, Havoc, Cascade, and Distilled Chaos tooltips show the cards that will be played from the draw pile.
toggle.enable_potion_draw_prediction.des: When enabled, supported draw potions show the cards that will be drawn, including cards after shuffle.
toggle.enable_card_draw_prediction.label: Predict card draw
toggle.enable_card_draw_prediction.descr: When enabled, Reboot and Calculated Gamble tooltips show the cards that will be drawn, including cards after shuffle.
toggle.enable_combat_transform_predictio: When enabled, combat transform selections show the exact card the current RNG will produce.
toggle.enable_driftwood_reroll_predictio: When enabled, Driftwood's card reward reroll button shows the exact cards the reroll will offer.
toggle.enable_relic_pickup_prediction.de: When enabled, relic tooltips (including Ancient options) show random cards, relics, potions, curses, and transform results that happen immediately on pickup.
toggle.enable_rest_site_prediction.label: Predict rest-site results
toggle.enable_rest_site_prediction.descr: When enabled, rest-site option tooltips show immediate random results from relics such as Dream Catcher, Tiny Mailbox, and Shovel.
toggle.enable_event_option_prediction.de: When enabled, non-Ancient event option tooltips show immediate random rewards, upgrades, and follow-up choices.
toggle.enable_crystal_sphere_clairvoyanc: When enabled, the Crystal Sphere minigame shows items through unrevealed fog.
slider.slippery_bridge_reroll_preview_co: Controls how many future randomized cards to preview for Slippery Bridge's Hold On option.
toggle.enable_ancient_event_debug_reroll: When enabled, Ancient event pages show a debug Reroll button that regenerates the current option set.
button.offer_predicted_non_ancient_relic: Only works during a run. Opens a reward screen containing the non-Ancient relics covered by pickup prediction.
button.open_predicted_treasure_room.desc: Only works during a run. Opens a treasure room whose relic target is randomly chosen from War Paint and Whetstone.
toggle.enable_frozen_eye.label: Enable Frozen Eye
toggle.enable_frozen_eye.description: When enabled, the combat draw pile view shows cards in draw order.
toggle.enable_shuffle_prediction.label: Predict shuffle order
toggle.enable_shuffle_prediction.descrip: When enabled, the Frozen Eye draw pile view previews the order in which the discard pile will be shuffled into the draw pile.
